title: Surgery Appointments - Karl Turner MP
text_excerpt: Surgery Appointments - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu Surgery Appointments I hold regular Advice and Support Surgeries, which are an opportunity to raise issues and concerns with your MP in person or via telephone if preferred. Due to high demand, they are managed on an appointment-only basis. Please get in touch via 0148 278 1019 or karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk. However, my office is always open for walk in visits if these are full or you issue can’t wait for a scheduled advice surgery. Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
